creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

I will need the full build log to debug this problem. Can you attach a full log? you can use script (1) to grab a full log.

the files that you are missing are installed earlier, during the staging phase, but you provided only log data for the packaging phase.

The files you are missing are all installed as part of the "desktop integration" step of calibre installation. So I guess there is some error in that phase which I need to see to diagnose the problem.


Thanks in advance.
